fixes: Escaped Java regex literals in TC4RecipeItemResolver: ConfigItems\\., ConfigBlocks\\., Items\\., Blocks\\., and -?\\d+.
Extended java_syntax_guard.py to detect illegal Java string escapes such as \d or \. before Gradle compileJava.
parity_impact: No TC4 gameplay/mechanic/recipe/GUI/asset behavior changes; compile-only hotfix.
